query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: A person wearing a patterned sweater and jeans walks across an open paved area, positioned toward the right side of the frame, with a background of vertical and horizontal structural lines that appear to be a building facade with multiple windows or panels.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person wearing a patterned sweater and jeans walks across an open paved area, captured with strong horizontal motion blur that streaks the entire scene into flowing lines, dissolving the background architecture and the figure's edges into smeared, ghosted motion trails that convey speed and transience.
